name: Fire Emblem
description: Nintendo and Intelligent Systems tactical RPG franchise built around grid battles, character armies, and permanent consequences.

eras.title: Kaga Era
eras.description: Original creator-led period that established Fire Emblem's tactical RPG identity.

eras.title: Revival Era
eras.description: Awakening and Fates revive the franchise commercially.

eras.title: Modern Console Era
eras.description: Large-scale Switch-era entries with broader RPG and social systems.
